(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)" as Define state "Shortlist candidate SDKs/libraries" as Shortlist state "Evaluate required features
(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)" as Features state "Run local benchmarks
(HealthTech_EMR_Sync)" as Bench state "Select candidate for PoC integration" as Select state "Reject or defer candidate" as Reject state "Document decision and integration plan" as Document [HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> Define Define --> Shortlist Shortlist --> Features: supports Flutter
target platforms Shortlist --> Reject: lacks platform support Features --> Bench Bench --> Select: meets PoC constraints Bench --> Shortlist: does not meet constraints Reject --> Shortlist Select --> Document Document --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech诊断引擎设计一个SDK评估工作流，从定义评估标准开始，最终输出决策文档。整个流程要闭环回到患者记录系统。
明白。我先确认一下结构：起点是HealthTech_PatientRecords，然后进入Define节点定义评估标准。这里用HealthTech_LabAnalyzer来标注Define活动，对吗？
对，LabAnalyzer负责制定标准。之后进入Shortlist筛选候选SDK，这里要分出两条支路——支持Flutter等目标平台的进入Features评估，不支持的直接Reject。
已添加Shortlist到Features和Reject的分支。Features节点同样用HealthTech_LabAnalyzer标注，评估完成后进入Bench进行本地基准测试，这部分改由HealthTech_EMR_Sync负责。
Bench的结果也要分叉：满足PoC约束的进入Select选定候选，不满足的返回Shortlist重新筛选。Reject节点同样要连回Shortlist，形成循环。
完成。Select之后进入Document撰写决策和集成计划，最后闭环回到HealthTech_PatientRecords。整个UML活动图结构已经对齐。
等等，Bench到Shortlist的返回箭头标签我写的是"does not meet constraints"，但之前Reject的标签是"lacks platform support"，这两条回路的语义要区分清楚。
确认无误。Bench返回Shortlist是性能或约束不满足时的重新筛选，Reject返回Shortlist是平台支持问题排除后的备选池更新，两者触发条件不同但都汇聚到Shortlist。最终Document输出后流程结束。
